tool_purpose: A pre-trained Text-to-Speech model for Chinese language using ESPnet framework. It can be used to convert text input into speech output in Chinese. Framework: ESPnet. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: Text2Speech.from_pretrained('espnet/kan-bayashi_csmsc_tts_train_tacotron2_raw_phn_pypinyin_g2p_phone_train.loss.best').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
